phrases.text_local: Onde posso selecionar um vinho para provar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo seh-lih-seeoo-NAHR OONNG VEE-nyoo PUH-ruh proo-VAHR?

likely_response.local: Pode escolher na estante de garrafas de vinho.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih shkoo-LYEHR NUH SHTAHNNG-tih DIH guh-RAH-fuhsh DIH VEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: You can choose from the wine bottle selection shelf.

responses.english: You can choose from the wine bottle selection shelf.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih shkoo-LYEHR NUH SHTAHNNG-tih DIH guh-RAH-fuhsh DIH VEE-nyoo.
responses.french: Pode escolher na estante de garrafas de vinho.
